chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-353 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 1657/25 3.For hearing of main case 29-04-2025 Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. **** It is case of the petitioner that he filed objections before the respondent No.3/Managing Director, STEVTA Headquarter Sindh, but the same have not yet been decided. Learned AAG submits that this petition may be disposed of while issuing directions to the respondent No.3 to decide the objections within shortest possible time. Such proposal has been accepted by counsel for the petitioner and he seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to the respondent No.3/Managing Director, STEVTA Headquarter Sindh to decide the objections filed by the petitioner within 60-days hereof. Let copy of this order be sent to the office of AAG and respondent No.3 for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
